files.patch:
@@ -251,0 +251,3 @@ + .nowrap { + white-space: nowrap; + } @@ -867,1 +870,1 @@ -
Evaluating Media Features in a Boolean Context
+
Evaluating Media Features in a Boolean Context
@@ -945,0 +948,6 @@ + + + + + + @@ -965,1 +974,1 @@ - aspect-ratio + aspect-ratio @@ -977,1 +986,1 @@ - display-mode + display-mode @@ -989,1 +998,1 @@ - prefers-color-scheme + prefers-color-scheme @@ -995,1 +1004,1 @@ - prefers-reduced-data + prefers-reduced-data @@ -1001,1 +1010,1 @@ - prefers-reduced-motion + prefers-reduced-motion @@ -1007,1 +1016,1 @@ - prefers-reduced-transparency + prefers-reduced-transparency @@ -1013,1 +1022,1 @@ - -fx-prefers-persistent-scrollbars + -fx-prefers-persistent-scrollbars @@ -1018,0 +1027,23 @@ + + Platform Features + Value + Type + Comments + + + -fx-supports-conditional-feature + + graphics | controls | media | web | swt | swing | + fxml | scene3d | effect | shape-clip | + input-method | transparent-window | + unified-window | extended-window | + two-level-focus | virtual-keyboard | + input-touch | input-multitouch | + input-pointer + discrete + Evaluates to true if + + Platform.isSupported(ConditionalFeature) returns true for the specified + conditional feature.
+ This media feature cannot be evaluated in a boolean context. +
